attacking_style: Does not rely on pure climbing attacks; excels at tactical opportunism in final kilometers, exploiting hesitation among breakaway companions. Wins through superior chase ability and patience rather than traditional attacks.
team_tactics: Receives specific tactical directives (KOM point collection observed), suggesting team willingness to sacrifice stage positioning for jersey competitions or strategic objectives.
terrain_preference: Technical finales combining climbs with descents or flat run-ins where chase ability matters more than pure climbing. Cobbled climbs that fragment groups but allow bridging opportunities suit him well.
vulnerability: Gets dropped on sustained climbs when pure climbing power is required. Relies on others' tactical errors and cannot stay with elite climbers on mountain stages.
key_patterns: Dropped on climbs but bridges back using superior descending and flat pursuit skills (2 instances)
Wins through tactical patience, waiting for leaders to hesitate rather than raw power attacks
Team assigns specific jersey or points collection roles beyond personal stage ambitions
form_trajectory: positive: Achieved first professional win in 2019 by successfully executing chase-and-sprint tactics after being distanced
